memberdef.name: FFT2D_getset
FFT2DObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "spectral.FFT2D", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(FFT2DObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)FFT2DObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a 2-D FFT instance.\n", .tp_methods = FFT2DObj_methods, .tp_getset = FFT2D_getset, .tp_new = FFT2DObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)FFT2DObj_init, }
